title: Endless Mercy Flow

sections.label: Intro
lines: Give thanks to the Lord, for He is good,
Through every battle, He’s understood,
His love endures, His mercy remains,
From dawn to dusk, through joys and pains.

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: He made the skies, stretched them wide,
Hung the stars, in Him we abide,
The moon and sun, by His decree,
Guiding us faithfully, eternally free.
He split the sea, made a path to the land,
Brought His people out with His mighty hand,
Through trials and deserts, He led the way,
Every step of the journey, His love didn’t stray.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Oh, give thanks, for His mercy flows,
Through every age, His love still grows,
From the heavens high to the earth below,
Forever His love endures, we know.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: He struck down kings, their empires fell,
Lifted the humble, His story we tell,
Through the valley of shadows, He shines His light,
Turns our mourning into songs of delight.
He feeds the hungry, calls us by name,
Covers the broken with grace, no shame,
From the weakest cry to the loudest praise,
His mercy stands strong, through endless days.

sections.label: Bridge
lines: His love is power, a fire within,
Breaking the chains, redeeming our sin,
No height nor depth can break this bond,
Through eternity’s veil, His love lives on.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Oh, give thanks, for His mercy flows,
Through every age, His love still grows,
From the heavens high to the earth below,
Forever His love endures, we know.

sections.label: Outro
lines: From generation to generation, we sing,
Of a love eternal, the joy it brings,
Forever faithful, our hearts restore,
Give thanks to the Lord, forevermore.

epigraph: O give thanks unto the LORD
